architecture.summary: CLI find command redesign + search API extension across 2 repos (vskill CLI, vskill-platform). No new services or architectural changes. CLI consumes existing API with new field.

integrations.summary: Existing API contract between vskill CLI and vskill-platform search endpoint. Add vskillInstalls field to response. No new external integrations.

ui-ux.summary: CLI output redesign: flat list, repo@skill-name format, clickable links, install counts, limit hint. Non-TTY tab-separated. JSON mode includes installs.

performance.summary: N/A - reducing default limit from 50 to 15 actually improves performance. Search index version bump triggers rebuild which is existing background process.

security.summary: N/A - no auth changes, no new endpoints, blocked skills already handled. Install counts are public data.

edge-cases.summary: Blocked skills show threat info instead of installs. Zero installs edge case. Missing vskillInstalls field backward compat (default 0). Non-TTY output format.
